description: PowerShell automation toolkit for configuring Windows Server hosts — Hyper-V virtualization hosts, failover cluster nodes, iSCSI storage clients, Active Directory members, and standalone servers. Ships as a code-signed EXE plus a PowerShell Gallery wrapper module exposing 201 structured CLI actions.
notes: RackStack requires Administrator privileges and auto-elevates when launched.
First-run wizard creates rackstack.config.json next to the EXE under the scoop shims dir (a legacy defaults.json is still read).
Releases are cosign-signed (Sigstore) — verify with `gh attestation verify RackStack.exe --owner TheAbider`.
